name: nexus-athena
description: Spec-driven planning framework (v3+v3.1), shipped as a Claude Code plugin + a Hermes plugin (hermes/HERMES_PLUGIN.md). Drives Spec-Kit /specify -> CRISP design -> EARS->GWT scenarios -> deterministic compile into a Beads (bd) durable PROVENANCE graph (spec->design->epic->task + verifies/satisfies edges). success_check = requirement proved, not just test-passed. 17 planner_* MCP verbs. Validated by evals/ (real pipeline = 92% mean recall over a 5-task set).
